questions.q: You need to create a Deployment named `backend` using the `redis` image with 4 replicas. Which command does this imperatively?
questions.explanation: `kubectl create deployment` is the correct imperative command for creating deployments. `kubectl run` is strictly for creating isolated Pods.

questions.q: Which command quickly generates the base YAML for a Role that grants read-only access to ConfigMaps?
questions.explanation: `kubectl create role <name> --verb=<verbs> --resource=<resources>` is the correct syntax. Appending `--dry-run=client -o yaml` outputs the YAML without applying it.
